FOURKITES TRACKING REQUIRED - NO EXCEPTIONS - SUBJECTED TO A $250 FINE. 2. Failure to communicate will result in a reduction of the rate up to $500. 3. All lumpers paid by the carrier will be reimbursed with a receipt. 4. Late fees not caused by the broker will be paid in full by the carrier. 5. Detention will be provided at $25/hr with communication from the driver/carrier after 2 hours of an appointment or 4 hours on FCFS. Max detention will be $250. MUST HAVE IN AND OUT TIMES ON THE BILLS FOR DETENTION TO BE APPROVED. 6. Layover will be paid at $250 per 24 hours. 7. Driver must have a clean oder-less trailer when arriving to the shipper. 8. Driver must report any Overages, Shortages, or Damaged goods ASAP to the broker.
